keyStoredLocally: Your key is encrypted locally in this browser.
serverDefaultProviderDesc: This provider is supplied by server environment variables. Its key and base URL are not sent to the browser.
errorFetchingModels: Error fetching models. Please check Base URL and API Key.
connectionModalDescription: No model provider is available yet. Paste a New API connection JSON to add one and continue to model selection.
connectionInputHint: Only JSON data with _type set to newapi_channel_conn is supported.
connectionPrivacy: Your API key is encrypted before it is stored in this browser and is never written to local settings as plaintext.
connectionConfigureLink: Open New API to configure a key and copy the connection data
connectionErrorInvalidJson: The connection data is not a valid JSON object.
connectionErrorUnsupportedType: Only newapi_channel_conn connection data is supported.
connectionErrorMissingKey: The connection data is missing a valid key.
connectionErrorKeyTooLong: The API key exceeds the length limit.
connectionErrorMissingUrl: The connection data is missing a url.
connectionErrorUrlTooLong: The provider URL exceeds the length limit.
connectionErrorInvalidUrl: The url must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS address without embedded credentials.
connectionErrorImportFailed: The provider could not be stored securely. Please try again.
setupGuideChoose: Select at least one model below. If the list is empty, use Fetch Models to retry.
setupGuideReady: The model is enabled. You can return to chat and start using it.
